title: Pettersson und Findus 2 - Das schönste Weihnachten überhaupt
original_title: Pettersson und Findus - Das schönste Weihnachten überhaupt
overview: Pettson and Findus find themselves snowed in their house. The little cat is scared that Christmas is ruined, but Pettson promises that they will celebrate "the best Christmas ever".
